info.name: AI Service API
info.description:
Complete API collection for AI Service (python-rag).

Includes:
- Health Check
- Email Classification
- Store Management
- Metadata Types
- File Management
- Chat (Query + Stream)
- FAQ Module (Semantic search & Synthesis)

Base URL: http://localhost:8000
Swagger: http://localhost:8000/docs

variable.description: JWT access token from nest-api (POST /auth/login or GET /auth/google). Required for Store, File, and Metadata write endpoints.
MongoDB ObjectId of file (fill after uploading a file)

request.description: Check service health and external connections (Gemini, MongoDB).
Root endpoint - verify service is running.

Manually classify an email. Returns label + extracted payload.

Labels: classRegistration | task | inquiry | other

Try different content to test each label.
Test inquiry classification. AI sẽ draft email reply sử dụng RAG.
Test endpoint: simulate processing one RabbitMQ 'ingested' message directly without actual queue.
Tạo metadata field type mới. isActive mặc định true, isSystem mặc định false.

query.description: Search by display_name of key or value

request.description: List all metadata type definitions. Support isActive and keywords filtering.
Check if a metadata key already exists in the system. Requires admin role.
Get metadata type by key.

Update metadata type. Cannot change key or is_system. For system metadata, cannot update isActive.

Use standalone endpoints to update allowedValues.
Add a new allowed value to a metadata type. For system metadata 'access_scope', adding values is forbidden.
Update an existing allowed value in a metadata type. For system metadata, 'access_scope' blocks isActive updates, and 'academic_year'/'cohort' block isActive updates for value 'all'.

Hard delete: xoá hoàn toàn metadata type khỏi hệ thống.
- CHỈ cho phép xóa khi totalFiles bằng 0.
- Trả về 409 Conflict nếu totalFiles > 0.
- Không thể xóa is_system=true types (returns 403).
- Trả về 204 No Content thành công.

Hard delete a metadata value from allowed_values.
- Only possible if totalFiles is 0.
- System metadata 'access_scope' values and 'academic_year'/'cohort' 'all' values cannot be deleted.
- Returns 409 Conflict if value is still used by files.
- Returns updated MetadataTypeResponse on success.

formdata.description: File to upload (PDF, DOCX, DOC, TXT, MD, HTML, XLSX, XLS, PPTX, CSV, RTF - max 20MB)
Required: must include at least one of academic_year/cohort

request.description:
Upload file to R2 + PageIndex processing (asynchronous).

Required metadata:
- academicYear OR cohort: at least one required

Returns file_id and message indicating background processing started.

query.description: JSON filter for metadata. Supports OR (array of values) and AND (multiple keys). 'all' value logic is supported.

request.description: List files with optional filters and pagination.

query.description: JSON filter for metadata. Supports OR (array of values) and AND (multiple keys).

request.description: Admin-only file listing. Allows filtering by storeId or listing across all stores. Requires admin role.
Get file details by MongoDB ObjectId. Returned customMetadata is automatically filtered by visibleRoles (Admin bypass).
Get hierarchical Table of Contents (TOC) tree for a file.
Download the file binary from R2 storage.

formdata.description: JSON array - use null for auto name
JSON array - one object per file. academic_year or cohort required

request.description: Batch upload multiple files. Returns summary of successful and started uploads.
Hard delete file (R2 + Qdrant + PageIndex/MongoDB).
Update file display name and/or custom metadata. Syncs metadata to Qdrant automatically.
Thử nghiệm bóc tách PDF sang Markdown (Không lưu tệp vào hệ thống).
Thử nghiệm bóc tách kèm chia mảnh (Markdown + Semantic Chunks).
Debug endpoint to inspect retrieved chunks and ranking before generation.
Xem trước dữ liệu trích xuất từ Excel.
Import FAQ hàng loạt từ Excel.
Tạo FAQ hàng loạt từ JSON.
Lấy danh sách biểu mẫu.
